subject: Idea proposal ready for PRD
body: Idea proposal with market research covering 21 Pete markets and 406 merchants is complete. Business revenue model with 3 merchant tiers (Gold, Silver, Bronze) and monetization schemas defined. Please consume IDEA_PROPOSAL.json to start PRD creation.

subject: PRD with 103 requirements ready
body: PRD covers 103 requirement IDs across 10 categories including UI, API, Backend, Commerce, Infra, Performance, DR, Maintenance, Funnels, Merchant Microsite, and Data Privacy. Full user workflows documented. Please consume PRD_ENTERPRISE.json for architecture design.

subject: Architecture blueprints ready — Full + POC scope
body: Full product architecture and POC subset architecture complete. C4 model diagrams (system context, container, component) generated via Mermaid.js. Free-tier mandate for POC (Supabase Free, Vercel Hobby, Railway $5, GitHub Pages). Zero-cost POC = ₹0/month. Please consume FEASIBILITY_ARCHITECTURE.json and POC_SCOPE.md.

subject: POC workspace ready — 8 pilot merchants
body: POC built with Next.js, Supabase, and sample datasets for 8 pilot merchants (Tarun Enterprises, Sri Vari Traders, Samskruti Silks x2, flowers2u, Pastry Cafe, Sri Vinayaka Textorium, Sanjana Apparels, Madhumathi All-men's Ethnic). Each profile has merchant_digital_readiness field. Approved as imperfect — gaps documented for full build.

subject: Sprint plan: 12 sprints, MVP = Sprints 1-6
body: Full program plan: 26 Epics, 113 User Stories, 12 Sprints (24 weeks). MVP scope covers auth-first approach, customer-facing workflows (browse, cart, checkout), merchant onboarding, and admin dashboard. Sprints 1-6 = MVP. Jira board configured. Please start DevOps pipeline setup.

subject: DevOps pipeline ready — start UI development
body: GitHub branching strategy enforced (feature → PR → CI → merge). CI/CD pipeline with 6 workflows: CI, Deploy, Rollback, Security Scan, PR-Agent, Code Review (SonarQube + Reviewdog). Docker/K8s configs for Dev/QA/Staging/Prod. Pre-commit hook active. Feature branch from develop.

subject: DevOps pipeline ready — start API development
body: Same as UI agent. Feature branch from develop → PR to develop → CI passes → squash merge. Pre-commit hook runs AI code review → TypeScript check → unit tests.

subject: DevOps pipeline ready — start DB schema
body: Same. Supabase migration pipeline configured. Database migrations in agents/03_execution_workspace/07c_backend_db_agent/. Apply via Supabase dashboard or CLI.

subject: UI interface map ready — auth, merchant dashboard, admin
body: UI interface map covers 3 personas (Customer, Merchant, Admin). Screens: Auth (login/signup), Merchant Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, shopping flows. Design system documented in DESIGN.md. Localized help strings embedded. Next.js app scaffolded.

subject: API specs ready — auth, merchants, products, orders, admin
body: Full RESTful API specification with 5 endpoint groups: authentication, merchants, products, orders, admin routes. Each with request schemas, response structures, authentication boundaries, and validation rules.

subject: Database schema ready — 12 migration files
body: Complete Supabase schema: 9 sequential migrations + auth v2 + seed data for 9 stores. RLS policies, index definitions, migration scripts with rollback. Data model documented in Markdown and JSON.
